Label: A boy focusing intently on playing a video game
Mother enters holding a box, places it in front of the little boy, and tells him it's his gift
Mother goes upstairs; the little boy curiously opens the box, and a puppy pops out
The boy was originally happy to see the puppy, but upon picking it up and finding it is lame, he suddenly gets very angry
The puppy keeps approaching, wanting its new owner to play with it
The little boy kicks away the red ball in annoyance, which the puppy mistakes for playing along
Influenced by the puppy, the little boy gets up to go outside and play with it, revealing that he is also disabled
